evidence_matrix.rule: WSIB clearance must be current and match the subcontractor before start of work
evidence_matrix.required_evidence: Current WSIB clearance certificate for Demo Roofing Ltd. valid for the planned start date of 2026-01-15

evidence_matrix.rule: Insurance certificate must be current and issued to the correct legal subcontractor name
evidence_matrix.required_evidence: Certificate of insurance showing Demo Roofing Ltd. as the insured, with required coverage limits and valid policy dates covering the project/start date
evidence_matrix.matched_document: Insurance certificate referenced in package text
evidence_matrix.source_excerpt: Insurance certificate includes a different legal name.

evidence_matrix.rule: Worker training records must be provided for roofing work before site access
evidence_matrix.required_evidence: Applicable training records for assigned workers, such as Working at Heights and any site-required safety orientation or task-specific training

evidence_matrix.rule: Safety policy / health and safety program must be provided and suitable for the work
evidence_matrix.required_evidence: Current company health and safety policy/program appropriate for roofing work, preferably with evidence of recent review or update
evidence_matrix.matched_document: Safety policy referenced in package text

evidence_matrix.rule: Contract or start-work authorization evidence should be present before mobilization
evidence_matrix.required_evidence: Executed subcontract, purchase order, notice to proceed, or written start-work authorization for Main Street Renovation
evidence_matrix.source_excerpt: No contract, purchase order, notice to proceed, or start-work authorization was identified in the uploaded package text.

blockers.description: The package states the WSIB clearance is expired. A current clearance valid for the planned start date is required for human review.
The insurance certificate reportedly uses a different legal name than Demo Roofing Ltd.; legal name mismatch must be resolved or explained with supporting evidence.
No worker training records are attached for roofing work, including required safety training such as Working at Heights where applicable.

remediation_plan.action: Upload a current WSIB clearance certificate for Demo Roofing Ltd. that is valid through the planned start date or provide updated clearance before mobilization.
Provide a corrected certificate of insurance naming Demo Roofing Ltd. as the insured, or provide corporate/legal documentation explaining the name difference for human review.
Submit training records for all workers expected on site, including applicable roofing and Ontario safety training requirements.
Provide a current safety policy or evidence the 2022 safety policy has been reviewed and remains active and suitable for roofing work.
Upload executed subcontract, purchase order, notice to proceed, or other written authorization tying Demo Roofing Ltd. to Main Street Renovation.

review.disclaimer: Not legal advice. Built for qualified human review. The system never auto-certifies compliance.
